# Vendor resources

This directory contains redistributable third-party data used by the native
application. Component licenses are kept alongside the corresponding files.

Minecraft texture atlases (`ots/res/atlases/vanilla.atlas` and
`ots/res/atlases/vanilla.png`) are generated locally and are not part of the
public source repository. Generate them with the tools in
`../tools/atlas-26.2/` using locally extracted assets.
